---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Your City · Your Field
:::

# Your Name.

::: {.tagline}
One or two sentences on who you are and what you care about.
Write something that's true and interesting.
:::

::: {.home-ctas}
[Selected Works](works.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Blog](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
[GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername){.btn .btn-outline}
:::
:::

::: {.home-section}
::: {.section-label}
Recent writing
:::

```{=html}
<div id="recent-posts-placeholder"></div>
```

:::
